__note: MASTER content for /contact.html, extracted losslessly from src/pages/contact.astro. HTML-bearing strings stored verbatim (entities included), rendered via set:html. {phone} interpolates from consts.ts PHONE_DISPLAY (§6.8). External-system boundaries (Cal.com widget, SunFire portal) stay in the component.

page.title: Contact Bret | AltaMedicare
page.description: Get in touch with AltaMedicare for a free, no-pressure Medicare consultation. Call {phone} or send a message.

header.ledeHtml: Whether you’re turning 65, comparing plans, or just have a question — we’d love to hear from you.

info.emailNote: Usually responds within a few hours
info.officeNote: Serving the entire state of Utah
info.afterHeading: What happens after I contact you?
info.afterTextHtml: Bret will personally reach out within one business day to set up a no-pressure conversation. You can do the call by phone, video, or in person — whichever you prefer. There’s no cost.

actions.ledeHtml: Pick whatever’s easiest for you — Bret personally handles every message.
actions.emailSub: Opens your email with a few quick prompts
actions.bookSub: Book a free, no-pressure time that works for you
actions.browseTitle: Prefer to browse on your own?
actions.browseSubHtml: Compare Medicare plans and enroll online — opens our secure plan portal

cta.textHtml: One free, no-pressure call — clear answers, no sales pitch.
